race.comment: MONDAY CHOICE (9) turned in a moderate run over this journey last time out, settling in a rearwards position and failing to come on when seventh over 1400m at this track. Has a win and a second from three spins around this circuit and is good enough to take this out. TAPA KICK (3) progressed nicely last time out to finish just a neck from the winner in second over 1400m at Blackall. This looks a sterner test than last time but on his best form he is capable of a big performance. SALTCLAY (10) has progressed nicely in her last couple of runs. Finished third at Cunnamulla two starts back then got the job done by 0.9 lengths last time out over 1200m there. Top-three credentials. SHARP DAZZLER (2) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 1800m at Tambo. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run.
